logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_RREADY' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARUSER' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARREGION' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARQOS' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARPROT' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARCACHE' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARLOCK' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARBURST' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARSIZE' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARLEN' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARID' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARADDR' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem2_ARVALID' to 0.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Setting dangling out port 'fft_core/m_axi_gmem1_BREADY' to 0.
